creator: draco@marino.st
text:
The MASTER_SITE_ECLIPSE settings are horribly out of date.  Most sites don't resolve or support eclipse anymore.  I have fixed this in dports.  I also fixed www/jetty which is unfetchable.

https://github.com/jrmarino/DeltaPorts/commit/947599ac1db5fade4a17059a7a3476b1932a1bfd

Please visit the above link for both fixes.  The patches should apply directly in ports.
